scene_reviews.risk_review: Low risk if screen footage avoids private data.
scene_reviews.revision_suggestion: Use self-made footage and avoid credentials.
Use text title unless logo permission is confirmed.

scene_reviews.topic_fit_review: Covers programming, AI, data, systems and networks.
scene_reviews.risk_review: Avoid showing private repositories, accounts or sensitive code.
scene_reviews.revision_suggestion: Use demo content or blurred screens if needed.

scene_reviews.topic_fit_review: Shows hands-on project development and communication.
scene_reviews.risk_review: Awards, rankings and official outcomes must not be claimed without citation.
scene_reviews.revision_suggestion: Focus on general teamwork and demo footage.
Use wide shots or obtain consent.
Use ending text card if permission is not confirmed.

main_strengths: The workflow uses five specialized agents with clear boundaries.
The video structure follows the 60-second NUTN CSIE promotional topic.
The project includes handoff files, trace, baseline comparison and safety notes.
main_issues: The final MP4, actual duration and file size still need to be confirmed.
Asset sources and permissions need to be filled after final editing.
Runtime screenshots still need to be added by the project owner.
required_revisions: Add final_video.mp4 and confirm it is between 55 and 65 seconds.
Complete outputs/asset_sources.md with real asset sources and licenses.
Fill team members and public GitHub repository URL in report and README.
Do not include unverified claims about ranking, employment rate, admission score, funding, awards or official partnerships.
